when required and bring the Desktop Computer back to its original

Yes 
7. OEM service center(s) must have been operationalin West Bengal
at least six months prior to the tender publication date. The 
bidder shall submit relevant supporting documents as evidence. 
Yes 
8. Indian Oil, Haldia Refinery will carry out an acceptance test of
the hardware before installation. In case of any discrepancy 
observed during the Acceptance Test IOCL has the right to reject 
the entire material supplied. All the licenses required (if any) for 
mentioned specifications/ features/ functionality must be 
available from day one. 
Yes
9.The supplied Desktop PC shall be under comprehensive 
on-site warranty for a period of 3 (Three)years from the date of 
acceptance. Validity of PBG shall be for 3 years. 
Yes 
 
 
10.The vendor must provide installation at site, support and 
troubleshoot (if any) without any extra cost. 
Yes
11. All the technical details to be clearly mentioned in the
offer with the technical brochures / literature as provided by 
OEM 
Yes
12. The supplied Desktop PC shall contain pre-loaded Latest 
Version of Open Office. 
Yes (Open Office 
pre-loaded) 
13. During the installation of the PCs at users’ location, 
bidder shall be responsible for users’ data transfer from their 
old hardware to the new PCs . Bidder shall be responsible for 
loading softwares like PDF Reader in all the PCs supplied at 
the users’ location during installation. 
Yes

--- Page 5 ---
14.Bidder shall submit a Bid-Specific Manufacturer 
Authorization Form (MAF) issued by the OEM on OEM’s 
letterhead, duly signed and stamped, confirming compliance 
with the technical specifications. The MAF (or its annexure) 
must certify the following:- 
1) Genuineness of the materials 
2) Factory pre-loaded genuine Windows 11 Home 
3) The absence of malicious code 
4) Spare support shall be Min. 5 yrs. from the date of 
installation 
5) confirmation of back-to-back warranty and support for 
the offered items along with the tender documents. 
Yes
15.The procurement of 473 PCs is intended for distribution 
of 1 PC per school in East Medinipur, West Bengal. 
Installation and three-year warranty coverage for these PCs 
shall be provided at the respective schools. 
Yes
16. Each Desktop PC shall be supplied with one Pendrive and 
one Mouse Pad from Day One. The Pendrive shall have a 
minimum capacity of 32 GB, support USB 3.0 and contain 
Windows OpenOffice and other required software such as a 
PDF Reader. The Mouse Pad shall have customized printing 
as per IOCL’s requirements. The content for printing shall be 
shared with the L1 bidder. IOCL Logo must be prominantly 
and permanently printed/embossed/metal fitted on CPU 
and Monitored. The content for Logo shall be shared with 
the L1 bidder. 
Yes (Bidder scope)

SCOPE OF SUPPLY CUM TECHNICAL SPECIFICATION DOCUMENTS 
Refer “Enquiry-cum-Offer” and all other technical documents (if any) under head “Technical 
Specifications” of bid document. 
Please refer document named as “Enquiry Cum Offer” under head “Technical Specifications” of bid 
document. Item sr. no. 0010, 0020, 0030….and so on of “Enquiry Cum Offer” document refers to 
schedule 1, 2, 3…. and so on of GeM bid document.

--- Page 7 ---
IMPORTANT INFORMATION 
No deviation shall be accepted on tendered payment terms, PBG clause and PRS clause. 
The offer of vendors insisting for deviations on these clauses shall be rejected. 
**************************************************************************************
Delivery Period: Delivery period mentioned in Bid Documents is IOCL’s preferred delivery period. 
The delivery period shall be reckoned from the date of GeM contract. 
Installation, Testing and Commissioning Period: The Installation, Testing and Commissioning 
period mentioned in Bid Documents is IOCL’s preferred Installation, Testing and Commissioning period. 
The Installation, Testing and Commissioning period shall be reckoned from the date of Site Handover. 
CNG / Two Stroke engine Vehicles are not allowed to enter the refinery premises. Please ensure to send 
the material in Non-CNG / Non-Two Stroke Engine Vehicles only 
Quoted prices are: 
Inclusive of charges for all facilities required for testing and all inspection requirements specified 
in the technical specifications and documents enclosed with the TENDER inclusive of 
destructive testing charges (if any),all expenses like travel, incidental and fees payable to third 
party inspectors. 
Inclusive of all IBR/IGC/NACE/Radiography charges as per IOCL’s technical specifications and 
the documents enclosed with the TENDER. 
All built in import content (if applicable) shall also be subjected to inspection by any of IOCL 
approved TPI agency, in the country of origin of the import content, and charges for the same 
are included in quoted prices, and no additional charges shall be paid by Owner.
